arts.ttl: Exclusive: Man Utd 'Want to Sell' Garnacho and Hojlund Alongside Onana
arts.sum: Manchester United are seeking buyers for Alejandro Garnacho and Rasmus Hojlund after also showing a willingness to offload Andre Onana

arts.ttl: Rory McIlroy's stance on Manchester United investment amid $1bn net worth admission
arts.sum: The Masters 2025 winner Rory McIlroy is a boyhood Manchester United supporter who idolised Roy Keane during his childhood

arts.ttl: I hope to see you soon – Ruben Amorim invites Rory McIlroy to Old Trafford
arts.sum: McIlroy previously paraded the Claret Jug at Old Trafford after winning the Open Championship in 2014.

arts.ttl: Manchester United £17m transfer plan emerges as Ruben Amorim makes stance clear
arts.sum: Latest Manchester United transfer news with an update on the club's summer goalkeeper search

arts.ttl: Man United stalwart throws full support behind "excellent goalkeeper" Andre Onana ahead of club's biggest game of the season
arts.sum: Manchester United centre-back Harry Maguire brands Andre Onana "an excellent goalkeeper" ahead of Thursday's Europa League quarter-final second leg against Lyon.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim insists he's found the positive in Manchester United's horror campaign
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim has endured an awful time at Manchester United, but the under-pressure boss has insisted there are positives to be found in their dreadful campaign

arts.ttl: Andre Onana on Man United 'trial' after Ruben Amorim decision amid future stance claims
arts.sum: The latest Manchester United news ahead of the summer transfer window as a spotlight is again on goalkeeper Andre Onana after being rested by coach Ruben Amorim

arts.ttl: Agreement for wonderkid Man Utd target expected THIS WEEK
arts.sum: Manchester United target Rodrigo Mora is expected to sign his new Porto contract this week, according to a report. The situation is only going to become even more difficult later this week when Mora is expected to put pen to paper on a new deal with his boyhood club.

arts.ttl: Manchester United supporters deliver Andre Onana verdict as Ruben Amorim makes Lyon stance clear
arts.sum: Andre Onana is set to return for Manchester United against Lyon on Thursday night

arts.ttl: Richard Keys: Amorim Gives Man Utd Two Reasons to Sack Him
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim has suffered a poor start to his Man Utd career and that has seen Richard Keys tear into him
